name: create_task
description: Create a new task with optional description, due date, priority, and project assignment. Returns the newly created task object with its ID.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: The task title/content (required in request body).

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Additional description for the task (optional in request body).

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: The project ID to assign this task to (optional in request body).

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Task priority from 1 (lowest) to 4 (highest). Default is 1 (optional in request body).

parameters.name: due_string
parameters.description: Due date in natural language or ISO format (optional in request body).

parameters.name: labels
parameters.description: Array of label strings to assign to the task (optional in request body).
